home.title: BVSR Conference 2026
home.slogan: The Next Giant Leap Begins Here
home.leftP: Discover the future of space exploration with us. The BVSR 2026 Conference offers four days of cutting-edge research, networking, and expert workshops. Don't miss this opportunity to connect with leaders and pioneers in the field.
home.rightP: Secure your brand's position at the forefront of aerospace innovation. Partner with the BVSR 2026 Conference to engage directly with top student talent and industry leaders, gaining valuable brand visibility and networking opportunities.

about.heroP1: German National Association of Student Spaceflight (BVSR) is the national voice of student-led space initiatives in Germany.
about.heroP2: Together, we connect ambition, innovation, and collaboration to shape the future of student spaceflight.
about.heroBanner: WHAT MAKES US WHO WE ARE
about.missionP1: BVSR (Bundesverband studentischer Raumfahrt) is an umbrella association founded in 2021 in Germany to facilitate networking and knowledge exchange across space related student groups.
about.missionP2: The aim is to improve space-related education and produce excellent STEM-graduates in space related field. While the focus is mainly on german-speaking countries student groups from all over Europe are welcome to contribute.
about.timelineFooter: The Next Giant Leap Begins Here
about.conferenceIntro: Hosted by TUDSaT in Darmstadt, the BVSR Conference will run from May 14–17, 2026. Across four days, it will bring together students, researchers, and industry representatives to:
features: Workshops on spacecraft design, propulsion, and much more.
Keynotes and Panels from leaders in academia and industry.
Student Space Forum where projects are presented and discussed.
Social Events to connect the community.
about.ctaText: Be part of Germany's student spaceflight community.

speakers.title: COMING SOON
speakers.lead1: Stay tuned — exciting updates are on the way!
speakers.lead2: Check back soon for the latest information.

contact.title: TRACE YOUR PATH
contact.connectP: Join us at the BVSR Conference 2026, organized by TUDSaT, and be part of a unique platform where students, researchers, and industry leaders collaborate on the future of aerospace.
contact.name: Name
contact.message: Fuel our inbox with your thoughts...

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: The protection of your personal data is very important to us. This Privacy Policy informs you about the type, scope, and purpose of the collection and use of personal data on the website of the BVSR Conference 2026, organized by TU Darmstadt Space Technology e.V. (TUDSaT).
privacy.p1: We only collect and process personal data that you voluntarily provide to us, for example, when contacting us via email or filling out forms (e.g., sponsorship form). Typical data may include your name, email address, company, and message.
privacy.p2: The personal data provided will be used solely for purposes related to the organization and execution of the BVSR Conference 2026 Conference, including responding to inquiries, coordinating sponsorships, and providing updates.
privacy.p3: We do not pass on your personal data to third parties without your explicit consent, unless we are legally obliged to do so.
privacy.p4: Our website may use cookies and server log files to ensure functionality and security. These do not allow direct conclusions about your personal identity.
privacy.p5: You have the right to request information about the data stored about you, its origin and recipient, as well as the purpose of storage. You also have the right to request correction, blocking, or deletion of your data.
privacy.p6: For questions regarding data protection, please contact us at:

impressum.title: Impressum
impressum.responsible: Responsible for the content according to §6 MDStV:
impressum.feedback: We would be pleased to receive feedback or suggestions for improving our website.
impressum.d1: The TUDSaT e.V. provides links to other websites on its Internet presence, which are maintained by third parties. The content offered by linked websites does not originate from the TUDSaT e.V. and does not reflect our opinion. TUDSaT e.V. merely provides access to these websites. We emphasize that we have no influence whatsoever on the contents of the websites linked by the TUDSaT e.V. and hereby expressly distance ourselves from all contents of all linked websites.
impressum.d2: The TUDSaT e.V. does not assume any liability for the contents of the pages to which reference is made from the TUDSaT e.V.'s own Internet pages. The TUDSaT e.V. also assumes no responsibility for the content, correctness, and legality as well as the form of individual contents – including those posted by third parties.
impressum.d3: TUDSaT e.V. expressly declares that at the time of linking, the corresponding linked pages were free of illegal content. The TUDSaT e.V. has no influence on the current and future design and content of the linked pages. The aforementioned restrictions and disclaimers apply to all links and references used within our own website.

dialogSponsor.tierOpt5: Additional services only (booth, workshop, job wall, …)

dialogSponsor.tierHint: See the Sponsors page for full package details.

sponsors.heroLead: The BVSR Conference is made possible through the support of industry, research institutions, and partner organizations. Thank you to everyone helping us grow the student space community in Germany.
sponsors.supportersIntro: We are grateful for the organizations backing BVSR 2026.
sponsors.programP1: The BVSR Conference is an annual event that brings together space enthusiasts from all over Germany. Both size and impact of this conference are growing steadily from year to year, which also increases the financial resources required. Therefore, we highly appreciate your interest in helping us organize this conference. Your influence can take various forms, which are explained in more detail below:
sponsors.programNote: Please also understand that this catalog is not yet final and we reserve the right to make changes. Should this be the case, we will of course consult with you to find a satisfactory solution.
sponsors.donationsP1: If you would like to make a monetary or in-kind donation outside of the packages listed below, simply get in touch with us. We are grateful for your help! As a token of our gratitude, we usually list all our supporters on our conference website and publish a social media post containing all supporters. If requested, we will happily issue a donation receipt. You will also be explicitly invited to participate in the forum of academic spaceflight.
sponsors.sponsoringP1: The conference sponsorship packages are divided into three categories. Each package opens up new opportunities for you and your company to participate in the BVSR conference and its potential benefits. We are open to your personal suggestions and requests in order to put together a package that suits you as well as possible.
tier1Benefits: Large logo on the conference website
Acknowledgment in the form of a dedicated post on social media
VIP seat at the forum of academic spaceflight
tier2Benefits: Large logo on the conference website
Acknowledgment in the form of a dedicated post on social media
Exclusive access to the BVSR CV pool
Job posting on our Job Wall (conference website) included
Opportunity to organize a workshop included
Approx. 3 m² booth at the forum of academic spaceflight included, including private parking at the venue
VIP seating at the forum of academic spaceflight
Access to the networking lounge at the forum
Significant support for the next “Giant Leap”
tier3Benefits: Main sponsor logo on the conference website
Logo placement at the conference (print media, presentation, lanyards/badges, flyers)
Acknowledgment in the form of a dedicated post on social media
Exclusive access to the BVSR CV pool
Pinned job posting on our Job Wall (conference website) for maximum reach
Opportunity to organize a workshop included
Approx. 6 m² booth at the forum of academic spaceflight with preferred placement, including private parking at the venue
VIP seating at the forum of academic spaceflight
Access to the networking lounge at the forum
Fifteen-minute speaker slot during the opening ceremony
Maximum support for the next “Giant Leap”
sponsors.extrasP1: In addition to donations and standard sponsorship, we offer the following services that allow you to tailor your presence at the conference to your specific needs.
sponsors.extraBoothTitle: Booths at the forum of academic spaceflight
extraBoothBenefits: Approx. 6 m² for 2 500 €; Sponsors only pay the difference of €1 000 to upgrade their booth to 6 m².
sponsors.extraWorkshopText: Organization of a two-hour workshop for approximately 5–20 members of the BVSR on a topic of your choice. We are happy to work with you to develop ideas that will appeal to as many interested individuals as possible.
sponsors.extraJobText: Get the opportunity to upload job vacancies (both for jobs and internships) directly to the BVSR conference website. This website is mainly used for the registration and the program, which means that your job advertisement will be brought directly to the attention of interested individuals from all over Germany.
sponsors.closingText: Questions or a custom package? We would love to hear from you.
